text.title: Asset Harvest Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the asset-harvest-checklist artefact. Validator enforces the listed required fields + cross-field checks.

example.note: checklist_id pattern fails; items has 1 entry, not all 5 categories; source=TBD; required item missing.

list.item: any required_by_launch=true item with status=missing at launch.
